overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting ancient Greek architecture. A female character in traditional attire walks through a succession of terraced courtyards, urban streets, and open landscapes, passing classical temples, statues, and market areas under bright Mediterranean sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated marble terrace with red carpets and classical statues

events.description: character begins descending wide marble staircase from terrace to lower courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking across a sunlit marble terrace with red carpets and descending a wide staircase toward a courtyard

entered.detail: tall classical statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
large ceramic pot with green foliage
long red carpet with gold accents laid on white marble
rectangular marble seating along the terrace wall
snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character begins on an elevated marble terrace adorned with red carpets and classical statues. She walks across the terrace and descends a wide marble staircase, revealing a lower courtyard with a fountain and columned gateway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal courtyard with central fountain and colonnaded gateway

events.description: passes through the columned gateway from the formal courtyard into the urban area beyond

agents.ego_description: walking through a formal courtyard with a central fountain toward a grand colonnaded gateway

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking toward the camera through the gateway

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with water in the middle of the courtyard
grand entrance with tall stone columns and a pediment
tall narrow evergreen tree flanking the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a sunlit courtyard featuring a circular fountain, flanked by tall cypress trees and classical statues. She approaches and passes through a grand columned gateway where another pedestrian walks toward her.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient urban street with market stalls and stone archway

events.description: exits formal architecture into rougher urban street with wooden market stalls
passes through large stone archway into open countryside

agents.ego_description: walking through a bustling urban area with market stalls and passing under a massive stone archway

notable_agents.action: merchant standing near wooden market stalls with fabric awnings

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with fabric canopies displaying goods
massive stone bridge-like archway marking the city exit
two-story building with wooden beams and plaster walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an urban area with wooden market stalls and rough cobblestones, passing merchants and guards. She then walks through a massive stone archway that marks the transition from the city to the open countryside beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with distant mountains and approaching circular temple

events.description: group of mounted riders pass by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along a sun-dappled stone path lined with cypress trees toward a distinctive circular temple

notable_agents.action: group of mounted riders on horses passing by on the right side of the path

entered.detail: circular tholos-style temple with tall columns and red decorative bands
tall cypress trees lining both sides of the stone path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined stone path in open countryside with snow-capped mountains in the distance. A group of mounted riders passes by on the right as she approaches the impressive circular Tomb of Battos, which grows larger as she nears it.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular temple plaza with downhill path continuing beyond

events.description: on-screen text label 'Tomb of Battos' appears identifying the circular temple structure

agents.ego_description: circling around the circular temple structure and continuing down the sloping path

notable_agents.action: man in blue toga walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: cluster of ancient Greek houses with terracotta roofs down the hill

segments.scene_description: The character passes the circular Tomb of Battos, identified by on-screen text, and continues along the descending stone path. Other pedestrians in traditional attire walk by as the path leads toward a residential area in the valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the refined luxury of an elevated palace terrace into the bustling city streets and finally out into a vast, mountainous countryside. It begins on a marble terrace adorned with red carpets and statues, descending a wide staircase to reveal a sunlit courtyard centered around a circular fountain and cypress trees. As the character passes through a grand columned gateway, the environment shifts into an urban market area filled with wooden stalls and cobblestones before the camera moves through a massive stone archway. The scene then opens into the open countryside along a tree-lined path with snow-capped mountains in the distance, passing mounted riders as the circular Tomb of Battos looms ahead. Finally, the camera follows the character past the tomb and down a descending stone path, moving away from the monument toward a residential valley below.
